title: Loans
noLoansBody: Add a loan to track its EMIs, remaining balance, and a month-by-month amortization schedule.
autoCalcHint: EMI auto-calculated from principal, rate and tenure — edit it to override.
variableNotePre: Variable-rate EMIs change over time and can't be auto-calculated, so we'll ask you to
autoMarkLabel: Auto-mark EMIs as paid on their due date
autoMarkHint: Otherwise you mark each EMI paid yourself. You can change this later.
autoMarkOn: EMIs are marked paid automatically once their due date passes. Turn off to mark each one yourself.
autoMarkOff: You mark each EMI paid yourself. Turn on to auto-mark any EMI whose due date has passed.
dueOnEach: Due on the {{ord}} of each month.
variableTitle: Monthly EMIs · you enter each month's amount
variableNote: Variable-rate loans re-price over time, so enter each month's EMI as your bank sets it.
variableAddTenure: Add a tenure (edit) to lay out the full schedule.
addInterestHint: Add an interest rate (edit) to see the principal-vs-interest split each month.
addEmiHint: Add a monthly EMI (and tenure) to generate the amortization schedule.
postsExpense: Posts a {{amount}} expense from the selected account on {{date}}.
variableEditNote: Variable-rate loan — enter each month's EMI on the loan's schedule below. The single EMI field is disabled.
dueBlankHint: Leave the due day blank to use the start date's day. EMIs already paid can be marked individually in the schedule.
